mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET username = #{username} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND id != #{excludeId}
